creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
garga       2009-07-16 17:33:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/scim-kmfl-sil-ezra Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    textproc/scim-kmfl-sil-ezra/files patch-Keyman::EZRAUNI24.KMN 
  Log:
  This is a keyboard for input of the complex Biblical Hebrew (including
  cantillation marks) with Unicode fonts. It is written in Keyman keyboard
  language and developed by SIL Non-Roman Script Initiative (NRSI).
  
  This port installs the keyboard so that it can be used through SCIM KMFL
  IMEngine (textproc/scim-kmfl-imengine).
  
  The keyboard is provided under the terms of MIT/X11 License.
  
  WWW: http://scripts.sil.org/SILHebrUnic2
       http://scripts.sil.org/SILHebrUni_Documentation
  
  PR:             ports/136768
  Submitted by:   Nikola Lecic <nikola.lecic at anthesphoria.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1360    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +70 -0     ports/textproc/scim-kmfl-sil-ezra/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/textproc/scim-kmfl-sil-ezra/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/textproc/scim-kmfl-sil-ezra/files/patch-Keyman::EZRAUNI24.KMN (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/textproc/scim-kmfl-sil-ezra/pkg-descr (new)
